page_metadata.biotools__summary: The 4DNvestigator is a MATLAB toolbox that analyzes time-series genome-wide chromosome conformation capture (Hi-C) and gene expression (RNA-seq) data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The 4DNvestigator is a MATLAB toolbox that analyzes time-series genome-wide chromosome conformation capture (Hi-C) and gene expression (RNA-seq) data.
